info.description: Backend API for the Student Hostel Management System.
info.title: Hostel Management API

patch.description: Admin can mark a complaint as resolved and add a message.

post.summary: Send a notification to a student

get.summary: Get room change requests for admin's hostel

patch.summary: Approve or reject a room change request

get.description: Admins can only fetch students from a room within their assigned hostel.
get.summary: Get students in a specific room

patch.summary: Lock or unlock a student's ability to change rooms

patch.description: Admins can remove students from rooms within their assigned hostel. A notification is sent to the student.
patch.summary: Remove a student from their room

post.description: Authenticate as student (matric_number + password) or admin/superadmin (email + password).

get.description: Returns a list of all chapels.
Returns a list of all faculties.
Returns a list of all hostels and their associated faculties.
Returns a list of rooms for a given hostel, including current occupancy.
get.summary: Get rooms in a specific hostel

patch.description: Allows a student to update their details. Changing faculty automatically updates hostel and removes them from any previously assigned room.

post.description: Student requests to move to a different room. Requires admin approval.
Allows a student to select a room within their assigned hostel, subject to level and chapel distribution rules.

post.summary: Assign a faculty to a hostel
Remove a faculty from a hostel

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and the JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
